title: AI Integration
description: Wrap the Anthropic SDK in a context provider and call Claude from reactive effects.
provider_intro: Wrap the Anthropic SDK in a context provider so any child component can call the API. The provider creates the client once. Child components access it via <0>useComplete()</0>.
generate_intro: The <0>GenerateHtml</0> component calls <1>useComplete()</1> inside a <2>createEffect</2>. When the prompt signal changes, the effect fires, calls the API, and passes the result to a callback. The <3>untrack</3> guard prevents duplicate generations.
pipeline_intro: The app wires generation and deployment together with <0>Show</0>. When a pending generation exists, <1>GenerateHtml</1> runs. When it produces content, <2>Write</2> saves it to disk, and the site list updates, which triggers AWS deployment downstream.
tip_persistence: AI outputs are persisted like any other <0>useAsyncOutput</0> result. The generation only runs again if its input props change.
